summary_plain_english: This document contains 2 potentially risky clause(s). The overall risk level is MEDIUM (40/100). Key concerns include Auto Renewal, Termination. Review flagged sections carefully before signing.

flagged_clauses.original_text: I may withdraw my consent at any time by providing written notice to the office of communications.
flagged_clauses.translation: The other party may be able to end the agreement with limited notice or justification.

flagged_clauses.original_text:
This consent is valid for a period of one
year from the date of signing below.
flagged_clauses.translation: This agreement may renew automatically unless you cancel in time.
